description: Intent resolution: agent outer shell; actions are explicitly first-class reusable wf-tools.

conversation.text: Customer support agent that can look up orders from Postgres, issue refunds via our billing service, and escalate to a Zendesk ticket. The lookup, refund, and escalation should be reusable workflows we can also trigger manually elsewhere.

intentExpectation.rationale: Agent outer shell; actions are explicitly first-class reusable wf-tools.
